product.name: ArWoWear T2 Static Pro
product.titleDescriptor: 99% Cotton 1% Carbon Antistatic Twill Fabric, 245 gr/m'2
descriptions: ArWoWear T2 Static Pro is 245 g/m², 99% cotton 1% carbon workwear antistatic twill fabric.
It is suitable to use on electronic industry where static electric formation is a problem.
Oil and gas industry platform workers can also use it to prevent static electric related explosions on dangerous area.
99% Cotton 1% Carbon Antistatic Twill Fabric, 245 gr/m'2
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>800N; Weft>600N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>20N; Weft>15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 2-3 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
functionIconLabels: >> ArWoWear T2 Static Pro Data Sheet

evidence: Oil and gas industry platform workers can also use it to prevent static electric related explosions on dangerous area.
matches.rationale: Product explicitly states use by oil and gas platform workers to prevent static-electricity-related explosions, an explicit energy-sector application beyond mere antistatic property.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Antistatic and flame-related workwear could plausibly overlap with metal industry environments, but no explicit welding/foundry/metallurgy use is stated.
